body.title: [sprint] AgenticLoop: bound accumulated context — stop re-dumping whole files every turn
body.intention: I intend that a long agentic build keeps its prompt within the model's context window so token growth is sub-linear in turns and the model never drowns in re-included file dumps.
body.description:
**Problem:** the AgenticLoop (unseen_university/devices/inference/agentic_loop.py run()) re-includes full prior tool outputs (Read returns capped at ~3000 chars) into the prompt every turn. In the 2026-07-03 DS.0 observe-run the prompt grew 2908 -> ~32000 input_tokens over 38 turns (102 Read calls) — LINEAR growth. Combined with the unset num_ctx (T-ollama-source-set-num-ctx) this overflowed/truncated the window and drove a 120s inference timeout at turn 39 (flat ~16s/turn cadence through turn 38, then a cliff). Even once num_ctx is set, unbounded re-dumping wastes context and degrades small models.
**Proposed shape:** bound accumulated tool-output context — evict or summarize old tool results, or keep a rolling window / reference (path + line-range) instead of re-embedding full dumps — so prompt-token growth stays sub-linear and within num_ctx.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/agentic_loop.py (message/context accumulation in run()).
**Design rules:** inference-proxy-only.
**Scope boundary:** IN — cap/evict/summarize accumulated tool-output context in the loop so token growth is bounded. OUT — the num_ctx request setting (T-ollama-source-set-num-ctx); model/tier selection.
**Test plan:** unit — simulate N turns each returning a large tool output; assert accumulated prompt tokens stay under a fixed bound (NOT linear in N).
**Completion criteria:** prompt-token growth across turns is provably bounded; a test asserts the bound holds over many turns.
**Rollback:** git revert.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
